name: ai-job-search-copilot
description: A local AI job-search workflow demo for learning LLM, RAG, tool calling, and agent orchestration.

scripts.demo:llm:mock: npm run build && node dist/index.js --llm mock
scripts.demo:llm:gemini: npm run build && node dist/index.js --llm gemini
scripts.demo:llm:groq: npm run build && node dist/index.js --llm groq
scripts.experiment:prompt: npm run build && node dist/experiments/runPromptExperiment.js --llm mock
scripts.experiment:prompt:gemini: npm run build && node dist/experiments/runPromptExperiment.js --llm gemini
scripts.experiment:prompt:groq: npm run build && node dist/experiments/runPromptExperiment.js --llm groq
